headline: KLA Split And Dividend Hike Contrast With Rich Valuation And AI Hopes
summary: KLA Corporation (NasdaqGS:KLAC) announced a 10-for-1 stock split along with a higher quarterly dividend. The company paired these shareholder moves with guidance that extends through 2027. Management pointed to AI-related demand, semiconductor process control, and advanced packaging as key supports. KLA focuses on semiconductor process control, a core part of keeping chip production efficient and reliable. With AI-related hardware buildouts requiring more complex chips, tools that inspect,...

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Deserve Some Love and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Wall Street has issued downbeat forecasts for the stocks in this article. These predictions are rare - financial institutions typically hesitate to say bad things about a company because it can jeopardize their other revenue-generating business lines like M&A advisory.
